headline: United Airlines Increases Bag Fees
summary: United Airlines is the latest U.S. carrier to increase fees on checked bags, following a similar move by JetBlue Airways earlier this week.  The cost to check a first or second bag is going up by $10 for customers traveling in the U.S., Mexico, Canada and Latin America, the airline said Thursday.  Prices for a third checked bag on trips are set to increase by $50.

headline: Why The United Airlines (UAL) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reassess Fuel And Margin Risks
summary: United Airlines Holdings has seen its fair value price target trimmed slightly from US$135.52 to US$132.67 per share, a small reset that still keeps the stock within a relatively tight valuation band. That shift sits between the more bullish targets above US$140 and the cautious cluster in the US$110 to US$135 range, reflecting how fuel and margin worries are pulling against still constructive demand views. As you read on, you will see how to track these moving targets and what they might...
